Package com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.noise

Interface AccumulatedMeasurementNoiseEstimatorListener<U extends java.lang.Enum<?>,​M extends com.irurueta.units.Measurement<U>,​E extends AccumulatedMeasurementNoiseEstimator<U,​M,​E,​?>>

  • Type Parameters:
    U - a measurement unit type.
    M - a measurement type.
    E - an estimator type.
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    AccumulatedAccelerationMeasurementNoiseEstimatorListener, AccumulatedAngularSpeedMeasurementNoiseEstimatorListener, AccumulatedMagneticFluxDensityMeasurementNoiseEstimatorListener
    public interface AccumulatedMeasurementNoiseEstimatorListener<U extends java.lang.Enum<?>,​M extends com.irurueta.units.Measurement<U>,​E extends AccumulatedMeasurementNoiseEstimator<U,​M,​E,​?>>
    Base listener for AccumulatedMeasurementNoiseEstimator to handle generated events.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void onMeasurementAdded​(E estimator)
      Called when a measurement sample is added containing new measures.
      void onReset​(E estimator)
      Called when estimation is reset.
      void onStart​(E estimator)
      Called when estimation starts.

    • Method Detail

      • onStart

        void onStart​(E estimator)
        Called when estimation starts.
        Parameters:
        estimator - estimator that raised the event.

      • onMeasurementAdded

        void onMeasurementAdded​(E estimator)
        Called when a measurement sample is added containing new measures.
        Parameters:
        estimator - estimator that raised the event.

      • onReset

        void onReset​(E estimator)
        Called when estimation is reset.
        Parameters:
        estimator - estimator that raised the event.
